features.featureTitle: In frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, replace the image element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/section[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/img[1] (the second image slot in the 'Our Campus' gallery section) with an element sourcing the new asset at /assets/generated/campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg. Use object-fit: cover so it fills the gallery card consistently with other gallery images.
